info.title: Convixx API
info.description:
Multi-tenant AI Voice Calling Platform backend. RAG-based question answering with self-hosted LLM and OpenAI fallback.

**Documentation:** Interactive UI at `/docs`. Raw OpenAPI JSON at `/docs/json` (same origin as this API).

servers.description: Current host (recommended for Try it out)

tags.name: Health
tags.description: Liveness checks for API, Postgres, pgvector, LLM, and embeddings.

tags.name: Customers
tags.description: Admin-only customer CRUD and API key issuance (`x-admin-token`).

tags.name: Knowledgebase
tags.description: Q&A upload and CRUD with embeddings (`x-api-key`).

tags.name: Settings
tags.description: Customer preferences such as RAG mode (`x-api-key`).

tags.name: Exotel Voicebot
tags.description: Multi-tenant Exotel Voicebot WebSocket system. Admin CRUD for per-tenant Exotel settings, live session monitoring, HTTPS bootstrap, and WebSocket status (`x-admin-token`).

AdminToken.name: x-admin-token
AdminToken.description: Admin token for customer APIs. Set in .env as ADMIN_TOKEN.

ApiKey.name: x-api-key
ApiKey.description: Customer API key. Scopes KB, agents, ask, chat, voice to that customer.

get.description:
Returns basic API health and timestamp.
No authentication required.

Verifies connection to PostgreSQL database.
Returns 503 if connection fails.

Checks if pgvector extension is installed.
Required for embeddings and vector search.

Tests connection to self-hosted LLM at ai.convixx.in.
Sends a simple prompt and returns response.

Verifies embedding generation works.
Returns vector dimensions (384 for nomic-embed-text).

post.description:
Creates a new customer with optional system prompt.
Requires x-admin-token. Returns customer with UUID.

get.description:
Returns all customers ordered by creation date.
Requires x-admin-token.

Returns a single customer by ID.
Requires x-admin-token.

put.description:
Updates customer name and/or system_prompt.
Requires x-admin-token. At least one field must be provided.

example.name: MarriageWale Premium
example.system_prompt: You are a premium support agent.

post.description:
Generates a new API key for the customer.
Requires x-admin-token. Key is used for KB, ask, agents, chat, and voice.

Creates an agent with name, description, system prompt.
Requires x-api-key. Each agent has its own system prompt.

get.description:
Returns all agents for the authenticated customer.
Requires x-api-key.

Returns a single agent by ID.
Requires x-api-key. Agent must belong to customer.

put.description:
Updates agent name, description, or system_prompt.
Requires x-api-key. At least one field required.

example.name: Premium Sales Agent
example.system_prompt: You are a premium sales agent.

delete.description:
Deletes an agent permanently.
Requires x-api-key.

post.description:
Uploads Q&A pairs to the customer knowledgebase.
Requires x-api-key. Each question is embedded and stored for vector search.

get.description:
Returns all KB entries for the authenticated customer.
Requires x-api-key.

Returns a single KB entry by ID.
Requires x-api-key.

put.description:
Updates question and/or answer. Re-embeds if question changes.
Requires x-api-key. At least one field required.

example.question: What exactly is MarriageWale?
example.answer: MarriageWale is a premium matrimonial app.

delete.description:
Deletes a KB entry permanently.
Requires x-api-key.

get.description: Returns `rag_use_openai_only`: when true, RAG uses OpenAI only (self-hosted LLM is not called). Stored per customer. Requires x-api-key.

patch.description: Set `rag_use_openai_only`. When true, `/ask` and `/ask/voice` use OpenAI for RAG answers only (same KB context and prompts; self-hosted is skipped). When false, default pipeline (self-hosted with OpenAI fallback) applies. Requires x-api-key.

post.description:
RAG-based question answering. Uses vector search + LLM.
Requires x-api-key. Optional agent_id and session_id for multi-agent and chat threads.
If the customer has `rag_use_openai_only` enabled (see GET `/settings/rag`), RAG uses OpenAI only.

example.answer: MarriageWale is located in Kolhapur, Maharashtra.

post.description:
Upload an audio question: Sarvam STT → same pipeline as `POST /ask` → Sarvam TTS on the answer.

**Requires:** `x-api-key` and `SARVAM_API_KEY`.

**Multipart form fields:**
- `file` (required) — audio (WAV, MP3, AAC, FLAC, OGG)
- `session_id` (optional, uuid)
- `agent_id` (optional, uuid)
- `stt_mode` — transcribe | translate | verbatim | translit | codemix (default transcribe)
- `language_code` — optional STT language hint (e.g. hi-IN)
- `stt_model` — optional, default saaras:v3
- `target_language_code` — TTS language (default en-IN): bn-IN, en-IN, gu-IN, hi-IN, kn-IN, ml-IN, mr-IN, od-IN, pa-IN, ta-IN, te-IN
- `speaker` — optional Bulbul voice (e.g. ritu)
- `speech_sample_rate` — optional, default 24000
- `output_audio_codec` — wav or mp3 (default wav)

**Response:** JSON with the same fields as `/ask` plus `transcript`, `stt_language_code`, `stt_request_id`, and `audio` `{ format, content_type, base64, request_id }`. On TTS failure, `audio` is null and `audio_error` explains.

200.description: Answer with transcript and base64 audio

example.answer: MarriageWale is located in Kolhapur, Maharashtra.

example.error: Missing audio file. Send multipart field `file` with WAV/MP3/AAC/FLAC/OGG.

get.description:
Returns all chat sessions for the customer, newest first.
Requires x-api-key. Includes message count per session.

Returns decrypted messages for a session in chronological order.
Requires x-api-key. Session must belong to customer.

example.content: We offer Sarja Raja Mini Carts and Yashwantrao Wada with pool.

example.error: Session not found or does not belong to this customer

get.description:
Temporary browser page: real-time mic → silence detection → `POST /ask/voice`. No auth to open; you still need `x-api-key` on the form for API calls.

Open in browser: `/voice/stream`

Lists Sarvam-backed STT/TTS languages, speakers, modes, and limits.
Requires x-api-key. No Sarvam call.

post.description:
Upload audio (multipart field `file`). Optional fields: `mode` (transcribe|translate|verbatim|translit|codemix), `language_code` (e.g. hi-IN), `model` (default saaras:v3).
Max ~30s audio. Server needs SARVAM_API_KEY.

Synthesize speech with Bulbul v3 (default). Use `speaker` (lowercase), `pace` 0.5–2.0, `speech_sample_rate`, `output_audio_codec` (wav|mp3|…), `temperature` (v3).

**Response:** Default is JSON with base64 in `audios` (the string can be very long). For **raw audio** use query `?response_format=binary` or `?download=1`, or send header `Accept: audio/wav` (or `audio/mpeg` for mp3). Use `?response_format=json` to force JSON. Optional `filename=myclip` sets the download basename.

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: If this header includes an audio media type (e.g. `audio/wav`, `audio/mpeg`, `audio/*`), the response is raw bytes like `response_format=binary`. Use `?response_format=json` to force JSON.

parameters.name: response_format
parameters.description: Use `binary` to return raw audio bytes with Content-Disposition: attachment (save in Postman / browser). Omit or `json` for Sarvam JSON with base64 `audios`.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: Download file basename without extension; extension matches `output_audio_codec` (e.g. wav). Default `speech`.

200.description: JSON with base64 audios, or raw audio when `response_format=binary`, `download=1`, or `Accept` includes an audio type

audio/wav.example: (raw WAV bytes — use Save Response in Postman)

get.description:
Returns the per-tenant Exotel configuration for a customer.

Secrets (`exotel_api_key`, `exotel_api_token`, `webhook_secret`) are **never** returned in the response — only boolean flags (`has_api_key`, `has_api_token`, `has_webhook_secret`) indicating whether they are set.

Requires `x-admin-token`.

404.description: No Exotel settings configured for this customer

example.error: Exotel settings not found for this customer

put.description:
Upserts the per-tenant Exotel configuration for a customer (one row per customer).

All fields are optional — only provided fields are updated (existing values are preserved via COALESCE). To clear a field, you would need a direct DB update.

**Fields:**
- `exotel_account_sid` — Exotel Account SID
- `exotel_app_id` — Exotel App ID
- `exotel_subdomain` — Exotel regional subdomain (e.g. `api.exotel.com`)
- `exotel_api_key` — Exotel API key (stored securely, never returned in GET)
- `exotel_api_token` — Exotel API token (stored securely, never returned in GET)
- `inbound_phone_number` — DID mapped to this tenant
- `default_outbound_caller_id` — Outbound CLI if applicable
- `webhook_secret` — Secret for webhook/WSS verification
- `voicebot_wss_url` — The canonical `wss://` URL for this tenant's Voicebot
- `voicebot_bootstrap_https_url` — HTTPS bootstrap URL that returns `{ url: wss://... }`
- `is_enabled` — Whether Voicebot is active for this tenant
- `use_sandbox` — Whether to use Exotel sandbox environment

Requires `x-admin-token`.

delete.description:
Removes all Exotel configuration for a customer. This will disable the Voicebot for this tenant.

Requires `x-admin-token`.

get.description:
Returns both **active** (in-memory, currently connected) and **recent** (from database, last 25) voicebot call sessions for a customer.

**Active sessions** include real-time info: stream_sid, call_sid, caller/called numbers, sample rate, duration, speaking state.
**Recent sessions** include DB-persisted call history with status, timestamps, and linked chat_session_id.

Requires `x-admin-token`.

Health check for the Voicebot WebSocket system. Returns total active sessions across all tenants.

No authentication required.

Returns the tenant's WebSocket URL as JSON `{ url: "wss://..." }`.

Exotel can be configured to call this HTTPS endpoint first, then connect to the returned WSS URL. This enables dynamic routing, signed tokens, or environment-specific hosts.

If `voicebot_wss_url` is configured in the tenant's Exotel settings, it is returned directly. Otherwise, a default URL is generated from the request hostname.

No authentication required (Exotel calls this).

example.error: Voicebot not configured for this tenant
